chain.thought: Explanation: Count the games where the team scored at most 30 points (<=30): 20, 30, 15, 24, 17, 27 = 6 games. Count the games where the team scored more than 30 points (>30): 42, 35, 34, 31, 48, 35, 34, 38, 42, 31 = 10 games.

judge_thought: Explanation: Determine the team’s score in each game (for wins, the first number; for losses, the second). The scores are: 20, 30, 42, 35, 15, 34, 31, 48, 24, 17, 35, 27, 34, 38, 42, 31. Games with at most 30 points: 6 (20, 30, 15, 24, 17, 27). Games with more than 30 points: 10 (42, 35, 34, 31, 48, 35, 34, 38, 42, 31). The Prediction Answer 6|10 matches these counts.
